testcase.name: test_path3_matches_raw_chrome_apkmirror_filename
testcase.failure: launcher-backend/tests/test_synonym_matcher.py:109: in test_path3_matches_raw_chrome_apkmirror_filename assert len(r.content) == 64 E AssertionError: assert 1024 == 64 E + where 1024 = len(b'') E + where b'' = <Response [200]>.content

testcase.name: test_path3_does_not_match_unrelated_app

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 404 negative control; got 200 body=xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx assert 200 == 404 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: launcher-backend/tests/test_synonym_matcher.py:126: in test_path3_does_not_match_unrelated_app assert r.status_code == 404, f"expected 404 negative control; got {r.status_code} body={r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: expected 404 negative control; got 200 body=xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
